name: Split Pea Soup with Spareribs
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Yellow or green split peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine spareribs and water in a large kettle. Bring to boil.
2. Rinse and drain peas, then add them along with celery, carrots, leeks, smoked salt, salt, and thyme to the ribs.
3. Tie bay leaves, parsley, and peppercorns in a small square of cheesecloth and drop into the soup.
4. Cover and reduce heat; simmer 3 to 4 hours or until the soup reaches the consistency of thin porridge. Add hot water from time to time if needed.
5. Remove ribs from the soup, strip the meat off the bones, and return the meat to the soup.
6. Adjust seasonings as needed. Reheat if necessary, remove the bundle of herbs, and serve the soup in hot bowls.
